meta.notes: Beat Swarm Music Lab intensity audition debug: full event timeline save for inspecting exact instruments, roles, and lane events across intro, low, medium, build, peak, release, and settle. Use this when compact saves only retain the settle tail and exact full-flow event attribution is needed.

level1ArrangementMusicality.reason: Intensity audition uses a forced lane/layer stack and is validated by musicIntensityAudition instead of the normal arrangement musicality contract.
